form.formComment: Two back was well beaten into seventh behind Double Lines at Tamworth over 1609m in a NR 35 to 38 on March 26 at $4. Then a handy effort when beaten by 8 m finishing second behind Bellrivergirl at this track over 1760m in a NR up to 35 on April 5 at $7.50. Heading the right way now.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Two back was well beaten into seventh behind Double Lines at Tamworth over 1609m in a NR 35 to 38 on March 26 at $4. Then a handy effort when beaten by 8 m finishing second behind Bellrivergirl at this track over 1760m in a NR up to 35 on April 5 at $7.50. Heading the right way now.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Pulled hard during the early and middle stages.

form.formComment: Last start by 2.25 m after showing early speed, (Fr3) at this track (2:09.40) beating Whiskey Royale in NR 41 to 45 on April 5 at $6.50. Can go back-to-back.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Last start by 2.25 m after showing early speed, (Fr3) at this track (2:09.40) beating Whiskey Royale in NR 41 to 45 on April 5 at $6.50. Can go back-to-back.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Held up over the concluding stages and ran to the finish under some restraint.
Locked wheels for a short distance inside the 100m and was unbalanced.

form.formComment: Last start 6th (Sr1) over 2160m at this track, beaten 20 m by Cut Glass (2:39.30) in NR 45 to 55 on April 5 at $3.80. At the start before 4th (Fr4) over 1720m after showing early pace at Dubbo, at the bell was 2nd-1.4 beaten 18 m by Hall Cash (2:03.80) in NR up to 53 on March 15 at $4. Rates highly and can bounce back.

form.formComment: Well-beaten 17 days ago at Tamworth over 1609m, and two back 8th (Sr4) over 1609m at Tamworth, at the bell was 9th-13.24 beaten 10 m by Thomas Royal (1:57.80) in 4yo+ NR up to 55 on March 12 at $17. Must do a lot more.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Well-beaten 17 days ago at Tamworth over 1609m, and two back 8th (Sr4) over 1609m at Tamworth, at the bell was 9th-13.24 beaten 10 m by Thomas Royal (1:57.80) in 4yo+ NR up to 55 on March 12 at $17. Must do a lot more.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Hung in rounding the home turn and contacted marker pegs.
Galloped away when the start was affected.

form.formComment: Six-year-old entire is racing in fine form. Won his last two outings at Tamworth both over 1609m. Last start won by 2 m as favourite when quickly away, (Fr2) at Tamworth (1:57.10) beating Truthbetold in NR 45 to 48 on March 26 at $3.70 at the bell was leading 9.48. Is a top chance again.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Six-year-old entire is racing in fine form. Won his last two outings at Tamworth both over 1609m. Last start won by 2 m as favourite when quickly away, (Fr2) at Tamworth (1:57.10) beating Truthbetold in NR 45 to 48 on March 26 at $3.70 at the bell was leading 9.48. Is a top chance again.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Pulled hard during the early and middle stages.
Slow to score up and out of position at the start.
Broke stride free of any external factors passing the 700m and lost ground.
Worked forward to obtain the position outside the leader passing the 900m.

form.formComment: Last start was well back in the run when 8th (Fr6) over 1609m at Tamworth was 9th-20.22 at the bell, beaten 16 m by Amillion Promises (1:58.00) in NR up to 58 on March 26 at $126. Two runs back was well back in the run when 8th (Fr5) over 1980m after being wide early at Tamworth, at the bell was 9th-14.36 beaten 7 m by Threebushelsofoats (2:28.90) in NR up to 60 on March 12 at $21. Unlikely to threaten in this tougher assignment.

form.formComment: Last start by 8 m when quickly away, (Fr1) at this track (2:10.50) beating Lookat Mee in NR up to 35 on April 5 at $3.90. Racing well and rates highly on the latest effort.

form.formComment: Back in form at the last couple of outings, two starts back won by 9 m after showing early speed, (Fr1) at Tamworth (1:57.50) beating Agent Callan in NR 39 to 44 on March 26 at $4 at the bell was leading 4.11. Last start just missed, good run when 2nd (Fr4) over 1760m after showing early pace at this track beaten 2.25 m by Gotonebettor (2:09.40) in NR 41 to 45 on April 5 at $2.20. Among the major players.

form.formComment: Last start 6th (Fr5) over 2160m at this track beaten 8 m by Rainbow Jet (2:40.10) in NR 45 to 55 on April 5 at $11. At the run before 6th (Sr1) over 1609m at Tamworth beaten 40 m by Coral Cays (1:58.30) in NR up to 52 M on March 12 at $6. One of the leading players on her best form.
